HomePage.title: PharmaTrack
HomePage.description: Pharmacy delivery management system — scaffold ready.

PharmacyUpload.heading: Upload orders (CSV)
PharmacyUpload.description: Upload a CSV of today's orders. Rows are validated before anything is saved — fix any errors and re-upload the whole file.

DriverPage.heading: Your deliveries
DriverPage.noDriverError: No driver profile found for your account. Contact admin.
DriverPage.noOrders: No orders assigned to you right now.
DriverPage.pickupPinPrompt: Enter the 6-digit pickup PIN from the pharmacy:

AddressPage.invalidLinkDesc: This address confirmation link is invalid. Please check the link from your WhatsApp message, or contact your pharmacy.
AddressPage.linkExpiredDesc: This link has expired. Please contact your pharmacy to request a new one.
AddressPage.alreadySubmittedDesc: Your delivery address has already been saved. Your medication will be delivered soon.
AddressPage.heading: Confirm delivery address
AddressPage.greeting: Hi {name}, please enter the delivery address for your order from {pharmacy}.

AddressForm.label: Delivery address
AddressForm.placeholder: Enter your full delivery address including street, RT/RW, kelurahan, kecamatan, city, postal code
AddressForm.successDesc: Your delivery address has been saved. Your medication will be delivered soon.
AddressForm.errorFallback: An error occurred. Please try again.

hero.heading: Deliver Medicine. On Time. Every Time.
hero.subheading: PharmaTrack connects pharmacies, drivers, and patients with real-time order tracking, OTP delivery verification, and WhatsApp notifications — all in one platform.

features.heading: Everything you need to run last-mile pharma delivery

items.title: Order management
items.desc: Upload CSV orders in bulk. Validate, track, and export with a click.

items.title: Real-time notifications
items.desc: WhatsApp alerts keep patients informed at every stage.

items.title: Address collection
items.desc: Secure tokenised links let patients confirm delivery addresses on WhatsApp.

items.title: Analytics dashboard
items.desc: Track delivery rates, failure trends, and pharmacy performance at a glance.

items.title: Driver app (PWA)
items.desc: Mobile-first driver UI with batch pickup, OTP confirmation, and photo proof.

items.title: Role-based access
items.desc: Separate portals for pharmacies, admins, and drivers with verified onboarding.

items.title: Pharmacy uploads orders
items.desc: Upload a CSV of today's prescriptions. PharmaTrack validates every row instantly.

items.title: Admin assigns to drivers
items.desc: Group orders into batches and assign to verified drivers with one tap.

items.title: Driver delivers with OTP
items.desc: Driver confirms pickup with a PIN, then hands off using a patient OTP — no disputes.

cta.heading: Ready to streamline your deliveries?
cta.subheading: Sign up your pharmacy today and go live in minutes.

footer.tagline: Reliable last-mile delivery for pharmacies across Southeast Asia.
